---
title: "MicroRNA signatures associated with radioiodine refractoriness and tumor dedifferentiation in metastatic papillary thyroid carcinoma"
date: 2026-03-09
author:
  - name: Leite, Ana Kober
  - name: Saito, Kelly Cristina
  - name: Theodoro, Thérèse Rachell
  - name: Pasini, Fátima Solange
  - name: Alves, Venâncio Avancini Ferreira
  - name: Kowalski, Luiz Paulo
  - name: Pinhal, Maria Aparecida Silva
  - name: Menderico, Gilberto Mendes Junior
  - name: Kimura, Edna Teruko
  - name: Matos, Leandro Luongo
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Endocrine"
  volume: 91
  issue: 1
  doi: "10.1007/s12020-025-04510-6"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">MicroRNA signatures associated with radioiodine refractoriness and tumor dedifferentiation in metastatic papillary thyroid carcinoma</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
